subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh the truth, yet most of the people hear it not. The verses have been sent down, but they perceive not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و القوم اکثرهم لایسمعون قد نزلت الایات و هم لایشعرون و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prophecy and fulfillment, @proclamation to the people of the world, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
